scripts.typecheck: cd packages/foundation && bun run typecheck && cd ../../services/games && bun run typecheck && cd ../wallets && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: cd packages/foundation && bun run test && cd ../../services/games && bun run test && bun run test:e2e && cd ../wallets && bun run test && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: cd services/games && bun run test:e2e && cd ../wallets && bun run test:e2e
scripts.docker:prune: docker compose down -v --rmi all --remove-orphans && docker volume prune -f
